mapper.select:
WITH training_list AS ( -- 교육관리 결과 목록 조회 SELECT -- 위험성평가 교육결과 목록 조회 (RORAT) rt.write_year, rt.doc_type, rt.doc_no, CONCAT(rt.write_year, rt.doc_no) AS target_id, rt.comp_id, NULL AS title, rt.asmnt_content AS content, rt.asmnt_place AS location, COALESCE(COUNT(ai.hr_id), 0) AS attendee_count, CASE WHEN my_ai.hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS my_participation, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rt.asmnt_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(rt.asmnt_start_time, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(rt.asmnt_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(rt.asmnt_start_time FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rt.asmnt_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(rt.asmnt_end_time, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(rt.asmnt_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(rt.asmnt_end_time FROM '\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, rt.created_at FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training rt LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = rt.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(rt.write_year, rt.doc_no) AND ai.type = 'ATTENDEES' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info my_ai ON my_ai.target_type = rt.doc_type AND my_ai.target_id = CONCAT(rt.write_year, rt.doc_no) AND my_ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id WHERE rt.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND rt.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY rt.write_year, rt.doc_type, rt.doc_no, my_ai.hr_id ), signatures AS ( -- 작성자, 검토자, 승인자, 참석자 서명 정보 SELECT t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS writer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approver_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_writer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_reviewer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_approver_count, CASE WHEN t.doc_type = 'RORAT' THEN SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'ATTENDEES' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'attendee' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) END AS signed_attendee_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS my_sign_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_my_sign_count FROM training_list t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = t.target_id GROUP BY t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, t.attendee_count ), date_counts AS ( -- 날짜별 카운트 계산 SELECT TO_CHAR(t.started_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS started_at_date, -- Keep date as is for grouping TO_CHAR(t.started_at, 'YYYY-MM') AS started_at_month, -- Extract month (YYYY-MM) for grouping COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM training_list t LEFT JOIN signatures s ON s.write_year = t.write_year AND s.doc_type = t.doc_type AND s.doc_no = t.doc_no WHERE true AND t.doc_type = 'RORAT' AND t.started_at IS NOT NULL
AND t.started_at BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.started_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(t.started_at, 'YYYY-MM') -- Group by date and month ), final_result AS ( -- Group by month and aggregate dates within the same month SELECT started_at_month, -- The month part (YYYY-MM) jsonb_object_agg(started_at_date, cnt) AS dates_and_counts -- Aggregate dates within the month FROM date_counts GROUP BY started_at_month ) SELECT jsonb_agg(dates_and_counts) AS result -- Aggregate all months with their dates and counts FROM final_result

WITH training_list AS ( -- 교육관리 결과 목록 조회 SELECT t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, t.training_date, -- Keep training_date as it is CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AS target_id, t.comp_id, t.title, t.training_content AS content, cd.minor_nm AS location, COALESCE(COUNT(ai.hr_id), 0) AS attendee_count, CASE WHEN my_ai.hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS my_participation, CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.training_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(t.training_start, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.training_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(t.training_start FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.training_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(t.training_end, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.training_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(t.training_end FROM '\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, t.created_at FROM esg.tb_training_result_report t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d cd ON t.training_location = cd.minor_cd AND cd.major_cd = 'C0023' AND cd.comp_id = t.comp_id AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AND ai.type = 'attendee' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info my_ai ON my_ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND my_ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AND my_ai.hr_id = #{hrId} WHERE t.comp_id = #{compId} AND t.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, cd.minor_nm, my_ai.hr_id ), signatures AS ( -- 작성자, 검토자, 승인자, 참석자 서명 정보 SELECT t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS writer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approver_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_writer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_reviewer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_approver_count, CASE WHEN t.doc_type = 'TRR' THEN SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'ATTENDEES' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'attendee' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) END AS signed_attendee_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = '202410080052' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS my_sign_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = '202410080052' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_my_sign_count FROM training_list t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = t.target_id GROUP BY t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, t.attendee_count ), date_counts AS ( -- 날짜별 카운트 계산 SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(t.training_date, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS training_date, -- Convert training_date to date TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(t.training_date, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM') AS training_month, -- Extract month (YYYY-MM) COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM training_list t LEFT JOIN signatures s ON s.write_year = t.write_year AND s.doc_type = t.doc_type AND s.doc_no = t.doc_no WHERE true AND t.doc_type = 'TRR' AND t.training_date IS NOT NULL -- Use training_date for filtering
AND TO_DATE(t.training_date, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYYMMDD') AND TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYYMMDD')
GROUP BY TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(t.training_date, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(t.training_date, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM') ), final_result AS ( -- Group by month and aggregate dates within the same month SELECT training_month, -- The month part (YYYY-MM) jsonb_object_agg(training_date, cnt) AS dates_and_counts -- Aggregate dates within the month FROM date_counts GROUP BY training_month ) SELECT jsonb_agg(dates_and_counts) AS result -- Aggregate all months with their dates and counts FROM final_result

WITH training_list AS ( -- 교육관리 결과 목록 조회 SELECT -- 안전보건교육 결과 목록 조회 (TRR) t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AS target_id, t.comp_id, t.title, t.training_content AS content, cd.minor_nm AS location, COALESCE(COUNT(ai.hr_id), 0) AS attendee_count, CASE WHEN my_ai.hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS my_participation, CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.training_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(t.training_start, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.training_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(t.training_start FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.training_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(t.training_end, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.training_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(t.training_end FROM '\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, t.created_at FROM esg.tb_training_result_report t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d cd ON t.training_location = cd.minor_cd AND cd.major_cd = 'C0023' AND cd.comp_id = t.comp_id /* AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' */ LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AND ai.type = 'attendee' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info my_ai ON my_ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND my_ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AND my_ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id WHERE t.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND t.training_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- :start_date, end_date AND t.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, cd.minor_nm, my_ai.hr_id UNION SELECT -- 위험성평가 교육결과 목록 조회 (RORAT) rt.write_year, rt.doc_type, rt.doc_no, CONCAT(rt.write_year, rt.doc_no) AS target_id, rt.comp_id, NULL AS title, rt.asmnt_content AS content, rt.asmnt_place AS location, COALESCE(COUNT(ai.hr_id), 0) AS attendee_count, CASE WHEN my_ai.hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS my_participation, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rt.asmnt_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(rt.asmnt_start_time, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(rt.asmnt_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(rt.asmnt_start_time FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rt.asmnt_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(rt.asmnt_end_time, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(rt.asmnt_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(rt.asmnt_end_time FROM '\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, rt.created_at FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training rt LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = rt.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(rt.write_year, rt.doc_no) AND ai.type = 'ATTENDEES' LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info my_ai ON my_ai.target_type = rt.doc_type AND my_ai.target_id = CONCAT(rt.write_year, rt.doc_no) AND my_ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id WHERE rt.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND rt.asmnt_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} -- :start_date, :end_date AND rt.use_yn = 'Y' GROUP BY rt.write_year, rt.doc_type, rt.doc_no, my_ai.hr_id ), signatures AS ( -- 작성자, 검토자, 승인자, 참석자 서명 정보 SELECT t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS writer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reviewer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approver_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_writer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_reviewer_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_approver_count, CASE WHEN t.doc_type = #{docType} THEN SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'ATTENDEES' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) ELSE SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'attendee' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) END AS signed_attendee_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS my_sign_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_my_sign_count FROM training_list t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = t.target_id GROUP BY t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, t.attendee_count ) SELECT -- 교육 결과 질의 본문 CONCAT(t.write_year, '-', t.doc_type, '-', t.doc_no) AS id, t.doc_type AS category, t.title, t.content, t.location, json_build_object( 'writer', s.writer_count, 'signedWriter', s.signed_writer_count, 'reviewer', s.reviewer_count, 'signedReviewer', s.signed_reviewer_count, 'approver', s.approver_count, 'signedApprover', s.signed_approver_count, 'attendee', t.attendee_count, 'signedAttendee', s.signed_attendee_count ) AS participantCount, t.started_at AS startedAt, t.ended_at AS endedAt, t.my_participation, CASE WHEN s.my_sign_count > 0 THEN CASE WHEN s.my_sign_count > s.signed_my_sign_count THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END ELSE NULL END AS signed, t.created_at AS createdAt FROM training_list t LEFT JOIN signatures s ON s.write_year = t.write_year AND s.doc_type = t.doc_type AND s.doc_no = t.doc_no WHERE TRUE
AND t.my_participation = TRUE AND s.my_sign_count > 0 -- :only_mine이 true일때 -- 내가 관여된 교육 일정만 필터링
AND t.doc_type = #{category} -- :category -- 교육 타입 코드로 필터링
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC

WITH training AS ( -- RORAT 교육결과 상세 기준 데이터 조회 SELECT rt.write_year, rt.doc_type, rt.doc_no, rt.comp_id, rt.asmnt_content AS content, rt.asmnt_place AS location, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rt.asmnt_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(rt.asmnt_start_time, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(rt.asmnt_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(rt.asmnt_start_time FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN COALESCE(rt.asmnt_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(rt.asmnt_end_time, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(rt.asmnt_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(rt.asmnt_end_time FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, rt.created_at FROM esg.tb_result_of_risk_assessment_training rt WHERE rt.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND rt.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND rt.doc_type = 'RORAT' -- :doc_type AND rt.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND rt.use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ), attendees AS ( -- 작성자, 검토자, 승인자, 참석자 서명 정보 조회 SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS writer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS writer_signed, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reviewer_signed, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS approver_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE TRUE END AS approver_signed, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'ATTENDEES' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attendee_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'ATTENDEES' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_attendee_count, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id 조회자 ID AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id 조회자 ID AND ai.signature IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN FALSE ELSE NULL END AS signed FROM training t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) GROUP BY t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no ), result_files AS ( -- 교육 결과 첨부파일 조회 SELECT json_agg( json_build_object( 'fileId', f.file_id, 'fileName', f.file_nm, 'fileExt', f.extension, 'fileType', f.file_type, 'fileSize', f.file_size ) ) AS files FROM training t JOIN esg.tb_sys_file f ON f.target_type = t.doc_type AND f.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AND f.comp_id = t.comp_id AND f.del_yn = 'N' ) SELECT -- RORAT 교육 상세 조회 질의 본문 CONCAT(t.write_year, '-', t.doc_type, '-', t.doc_no) AS id, t.doc_type AS category, t.location, -- 교육 장소 (nullable) t.content, -- 교육 내용 (nullable) t.started_at AS startedAt, -- 교육 시작일시 t.ended_at AS endedAt, -- 교육 종료일시 json_build_object( 'attendee', attendee_count, 'signedAttendee', signed_attendee_count ) AS participantCount, -- 참석자 서명 정보 a.signed, -- 내 서명 여부 (nullable) COALESCE(rf.files, '[]'::json) AS files, -- 교육 결과 파일 (nullable) CASE WHEN a.writer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', a.writer_hr_id, 'name', a.writer_name, 'jobTitle', a.writer_job_title, 'orgName', a.writer_org_name, 'signed', a.writer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS writer, -- 작성자 (nullable) CASE WHEN a.reviewer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', a.reviewer_hr_id, 'name', a.reviewer_name, 'jobTitle', a.reviewer_job_title, 'orgName', a.reviewer_org_name, 'signed', a.reviewer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS reviewer, -- 검토자 (nullable) CASE WHEN a.approver_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', a.approver_hr_id, 'name', a.approver_name, 'jobTitle', a.approver_job_title, 'orgName', a.approver_org_name, 'signed', a.approver_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS approver, -- 승인자 (nullable) t.created_at AS createdAt FROM training t LEFT JOIN attendees a ON TRUE LEFT JOIN result_files rf ON TRUE

WITH training AS ( -- 안전보건 교육(TRR) 상세 기준 데이터 조회 SELECT t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no, t.comp_id, t.title, cd1.minor_nm AS institute, cd2.minor_nm AS instructor, cd3.minor_nm AS location, t.training_goal, t.expected_effect, t.training_content AS content, t.materials, t.projector, t.vtr, t.materials_etc, t.remark, CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.training_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(t.training_start, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.training_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(t.training_start FROM '^\d{2}:\d{2}'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS started_at, CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.training_date, '') != '' AND COALESCE(t.training_end, '') != '' IS NOT NULL THEN TO_TIMESTAMP(t.training_date || ' ' || SUBSTRING(t.training_end FROM '\d{2}:\d{2}$'), 'YYYYMMDD HH24:MI')::timestamp ELSE NULL END AS ended_at, t.created_at FROM esg.tb_training_result_report t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d cd1 ON t.training_institute = cd1.minor_cd AND cd1.major_cd = 'C0019' AND cd1.comp_id = t.comp_id /* AND cd1.use_yn = 'Y' */ LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d cd2 ON t.training_instructor = cd2.minor_cd AND cd2.major_cd = 'C0020' AND cd2.comp_id = t.comp_id /* AND cd2.use_yn = 'Y' */ LEFT JOIN esg.tb_common_d cd3 ON t.training_location = cd3.minor_cd AND cd3.major_cd = 'C0023' AND cd3.comp_id = t.comp_id /* AND cd3.use_yn = 'Y' */ WHERE t.comp_id = #{compId} -- :comp_id AND t.write_year = #{writeYear} -- :write_year AND t.doc_type = #{docType} -- :doc_type AND t.doc_no = #{docNo} -- :doc_no AND t.use_yn = 'Y' LIMIT 1 ), signatures AS ( -- 작성자, 검토자, 승인자, 참석자 서명 정보 조회 SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS writer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS writer_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'writer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS writer_signed, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS reviewer_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'reviewer' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS reviewer_signed, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.hr_id ELSE NULL END) AS approver_hr_id, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.hr_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_name, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.jbrp_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_job_title, MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' THEN ai.orgn_nm ELSE NULL END) AS approver_org_name, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.param = 'approver' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE ELSE TRUE END AS approver_signed, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'attendee' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attendee_count, SUM(CASE WHEN ai.type = 'attendee' AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS signed_attendee_count, CASE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id 조회자 ID AND ai.signature IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN TRUE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN ai.hr_id = #{hrId} -- :hr_id 조회자 ID AND ai.signature IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= 1 THEN FALSE ELSE NULL END AS signed FROM training t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_approval_info ai ON ai.target_type = t.doc_type AND ai.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) GROUP BY t.write_year, t.doc_type, t.doc_no ) /* attendees AS ( -- 참석자 정보 조회 SELECT COUNT(hi.hr_id) AS attendee_count, COUNT(hi.hr_id) AS signed_attendee_count FROM training t LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_incharge_map hi ON hi.target_type = t.doc_type AND hi.target_id = CONCAT(t.write_year, t.doc_no) AND hi.use_yn = 'Y' )*/ SELECT -- TRR 교육 상세 조회 질의 본문 CONCAT(t.write_year, '-', t.doc_type , '-', t.doc_no) AS id, t.doc_type AS category, t.title, -- 제목 (nullable) t.location, -- 교육 장소 (nullable) t.training_goal AS goal, -- 교육 목표 (nullable) t.expected_effect AS expectedEffect, -- 기대효과 (nullable) json_build_object ( 'book', t.materials, -- 교안 (nullable) 'projector', t.projector, -- 프로젝터 (nullable) 'vtr', t.vtr, -- VTR (nullable) 'misc', t.materials_etc -- 교육자료 기타 (nullable) ) AS material, CASE WHEN t.instructor IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'name', t.instructor, 'institute', t.institute ) ELSE NULL END AS trainer, -- 강사 정보 (nullable) t.content, -- 교육 내용 (nullable) t.remark, -- 특기사항 (nullable) t.started_at AS startedAt, -- 교육 시작일시 (nullable) t.ended_at AS endedAt, -- 교육 종료일시 (nullable) json_build_object( 'attendee', attendee_count, 'signedAttendee', signed_attendee_count ) AS participantCount, -- 참석자 서명 정보 s.signed, -- 내 서명 여부 (nullable) CASE WHEN s.writer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', s.writer_hr_id, 'name', s.writer_name, 'jobTitle', s.writer_job_title, 'orgName', s.writer_org_name, 'signed', s.writer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS writer, -- 작성자 (nullable) CASE WHEN s.reviewer_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', s.reviewer_hr_id, 'name', s.reviewer_name, 'jobTitle', s.reviewer_job_title, 'orgName', s.reviewer_org_name, 'signed', s.reviewer_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS reviewer, -- 검토자 (nullable) CASE WHEN s.approver_hr_id IS NOT NULL THEN json_build_object( 'hrId', s.approver_hr_id, 'name', s.approver_name, 'jobTitle', s.approver_job_title, 'orgName', s.approver_org_name, 'signed', s.approver_signed ) ELSE NULL END AS approver, -- 승인자 (nullable) t.created_at AS createdAt -- 생성일시 (nullable) FROM training t LEFT JOIN signatures s ON TRUE
